signals.label: Specificity
signals.description: How concrete and bounded the claim feels.

signals.label: Proof
signals.description: How much evidence or lived credibility is visible.

signals.label: Clarity
signals.description: How easy it is to understand in a fast skim.

signals.label: Tension
signals.description: How much thoughtful contrast and judgment appears.

signals.label: Warmth
signals.description: How human and approachable the tone feels.
